LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.description: A massive, heavily reinforced cage designed to contain the largest and most 危险 wasteland predators. Originally designed for pre-war zoos and research facilities, these cages feature reinforced steel construction and advanced containment systems. Only the most skilled engineers can properly construct these formidable enclosures.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Large.label: 大型动物笼
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.description: A reinforced cage capable of h老旧ing medium-sized wasteland creatures. Built with thicker steel bars and improved locking mechanisms, this cage can safely contain animals that would easily escape from s商场er enclosures. Popular among wasteland traders who deal in exotic mutated pets and working animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Medium.label: 中型动物笼
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.description: A sturdy metal cage designed to safely capture and contain s商场 wasteland creatures. Originally used by pre-war researchers and hunters, these cages have proven invaluable for wastelanders looking to domesticate the various mutated animals roaming the post-nuclear landscape. Requires regular feeding to maintain captured animals.
LanguageData.FCP_AnimalCage_Small.label: s商场 animal cage
